title: Lab 42: Process Kill And Renice
description: Identify a running process, terminate it, and adjust the scheduling priority of another one.

tasks.title: user worker42 has a CPU-bound process whose PID is
tasks.prompt: On clientvm, user worker42 has a CPU-bound process whose PID is stored in /home/worker42/cpu.pid. Terminate that process.

tasks.title: User worker42 also has a long-running sleep process
tasks.prompt: User worker42 also has a long-running sleep process whose PID is stored in /home/worker42/sleep.pid. Change the nice value of that process to 10.

hints: Use kill or pkill for the first process and renice for the second one.
